# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Deploy to Production

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2
    
    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: '14'
    
    - name: Install dependencies
      run: npm install
    
    - name: Run tests
      run: npm test

  deploy:
    needs: build-and-test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2
    
    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: '14'
    
    - name: Deploy to production
      run: |
        echo "Deploying to production..."
        # Add your deployment command here, e.g., npm run deploy
